summary: Updated React components (BuildTracker.tsx) with Pulse terminology: Workers→Drops, Waves→Streams. Added Legacy badge for format===legacy. Added drop status breakdown display (e.g., '2 complete, 1 running, 3 pending'). Added Stream X/Y display when total streams > 1. Added Pulse/Legend counts in header. Added Pending and Failed build sections with proper toggle states. TypeScript compiles without errors.
test_results: TypeScript compilation successful - no BuildTracker-related errors. Component uses new Build interface with format, streams, drops fields while maintaining backward compatibility with legacy type/completed_at fields.
